subject: [FYI] DQ snapshot — PROD event issues (2026-04-30)
body:
Porter load audit surfaced three DQ patterns in TangoTiempoProd (appId=1, future events). FYI only — Harvey has the first item, routing to you for pipeline awareness.

## Issue 1: 48 Detroit events with category='OTHER'
Source: porter-harvey (detroit site). 48 future events classified as 'OTHER' — not a valid TangoTiempo category. Harvey's classifier produced an unrecognized output. Expected one of: Milonga, Practica, Class, Workshop, Festival, Marathon, Encuentro.

## Issue 2: 225 events with no masteredCityName
171 of these are local events (Milonga/Practica/Class) — they're invisible on city pages because they have no mastered city assignment. The other 54 are Festivals/Marathons/Encuentros which are intentionally global (travelWorthy=true, no city needed — OK).
Root cause likely: venue lat/lng doesn't match any masteredCity radius, or venue was loaded without geo.

## Issue 3: 224 events with empty category_first (Harvey classifier gap)
Affected sites: sanjuan-pr (175), boston-master (25), denver-9 (24). Events passed skip_reason gate but have category_first=''. Already flagged to Harvey directly (2026-04-30).

## travelWorthy status
Almost zero travelWorthy events showing in PROD despite content existing in TEST. Waiting on Fulton CALBEAF-110 bulk-enrich rerun on PROD.

— Porter
